title: cochlospermum fraseri subsp. fraseri
intro: Cochlospermum fraseri subsp. fraseri, a plant species also known as Fraser's cochlospermum or African coral tree, is a flowering plant native to tropical Africa. The medicinal properties of Cochlospermum fraseri subsp. fraseri include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are beneficial for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Cochlospermum fraseri subsp. fraseri typically involve making infusions or decoctions from its leaves and roots, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
